description: A desolate scene depicts a sea of fog broken by great mountains and jagged ruins.  The painting seems to shift ever so slightly, as if the winds depicted within were real.

variants.description: Its engraved with an image showing a winged ship over a three peaked mountain.
This medallion is engraved with the image of a fanciful beast set before a starfield.  Its head is strangely piscine, with a wide, toothy maw and no eyes.

Three articulate discs are mounted within this medallion and can be rotated independently, creating a strange, shifting pattern of holes.  You believe it to be a starchart of some kind, but the allowed movements of the discs don't seem to correspond to how stars move in the sky.
A small sword shaped pendant wrapped in a still pristine indigo handkerchief.  Threads of silver and gold are woven into the fabric.
A necklace with a pendant in the shape of a tree.  The treetop and roots are completely symmetrical, and a small sphere-cut gem is set in the center of the trunk.

description: A small silver coin, looted from the dead.  Its face shows the faded profile of a man, the reverse depicts a tree crowned by three starlike eyes.
A cloak of thin, faded cloth that was used to wrap a corpse.  Its deep blue, and embroidered has been embroidered with a starmap in silver thread.

variants.description: A cloak of thin, faded cloth that was used to wrap a corpse.  Its deep blue, and embroidered has been embroidered with a starmap in silver thread.
Violet clouds part to reveal a road winding into the starry sky.  The constellations embroidered on this shroud seem to match the ones above you.

This shroud is dyed a deep, inky black.  The star map embroidered on it is more intricate than others you have seen, and includes a number of small, gem-like beads sewn into the fabric at various points.
Ramping beasts and blossoming plants are embroidered in gold thread across this shroud, which is dyed a vibrant emerald green.
White towers rise from a jagged coastline, in a heavily geometric pattern that repeats across the entire shroud.
Fanged beasts devour each other in appalling detail across this shroud.  The embroidery is so intricate that it seems to shift and writhe as you look at it.
